
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(CellChat)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
```

#The multi-omics CosMx dataset was genertated from the same slide and aligned by the CosMx provider Bruker/Nanostring
```{r}
#the raw CosMx dataset can be accessed through GEO GSE311636
#for Figure 3A left (RNA)

#seurat object was generated by AtoMx directly
obj.387R <- readRDS("~/seuratObject_Cos4.387R.367R.RNA.2.6.21.RDS")

#subset to fov = 52
Idents(obj.387R) <- "fov"
obj.387R.fov52 <- subset(obj.387R, idents = "52")

DefaultBoundary(obj.387R.fov52[["Cos4.387R.367R.RNA.2.6.21"]]) <- "segmentation"

ImageFeaturePlot(obj.387R.fov52, fov = "Cos4.387R.367R.RNA.2.6.21", features = "SPP1", max.cutoff = "q95")
ImageFeaturePlot(obj.387R.fov52, fov = "Cos4.387R.367R.RNA.2.6.21", features = "CHI3L", max.cutoff = "q95")


#The Figure 3A right (protein) is generated from AtoMx directly
```
